src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Add imports for SLF4J Logger and LoggerFactory to enable logging in the test class.
Add import for Slf4jLogConsumer to route container logs to SLF4J.
Add import for LogMessageWaitStrategy, likely for future or implicit wait configuration.
Add import for java.time.Duration to support modern timeout configurations.
Add import for JUnit 5 AfterAll annotation to support cleanup logic.
Remove unused import for LocalServerPort as port retrieval is now done via Environment.
Change test class visibility from public to package-private, a common modernization practice.
Initialize a static SLF4J logger instance for the test class.
Add a static field to hold ChromeOptions, moving initialization out of the container builder.
Configure the Testcontainers browser container to output logs to SLF4J.
Move ChromeOptions configuration from the container builder to the beforeAll method for better control.
Add --remote-allow-origins=* argument to ChromeOptions to allow remote debugging connections from any origin.
Configure Selenide to save screenshots and reports to a specific target folder.
Add an AfterAll method to explicitly close the WebDriver instance after tests.
Set an implicit wait timeout on the RemoteWebDriver using java.time.Duration.
Rename the screenshot file identifier to be more specific to the test class.
Set Selenide Configuration.baseUrl explicitly to allow relative URL navigation in tests.
Update Selenide.open calls to use relative paths now that baseUrl is configured.
Add --remote-allow-origins=* Chrome argument to support newer ChromeDriver/CDP requirements.
Explicitly configure the Selenide reports folder for screenshots.
Ensure WebDriver is closed after all tests to prevent resource leaks.
Rename the screenshot file to be more descriptive and unique to the test class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Testcontainers to 1.18.3 for compatibility with newer Docker and Java versions.
Upgrade Selenium to 4.8.3 to support modern browser drivers and Java 21.
Update Selenide to 6.16.0 to ensure compatibility with the upgraded Selenium and Java versions.
Explicitly manage Apache HttpClient 5 version, likely required by Spring Boot 3 or updated dependencies.
Add explicit Maven Surefire plugin configuration to ensure unit tests run correctly on Java 21.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe plugin to 3.1.2 to support Java 21 integration tests.

.github/workflows/broken-links.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the checkout action from v2 to v3 to align with current GitHub Actions best practices.
Pin the markdown-link-check package to a specific version to ensure reproducible CI builds.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI runner from a specific older Ubuntu version to the latest available image.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution version from 3.8.6 to 3.9.1 to align with newer build tooling standards.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from version 0.5.6 to 3.1.0 to use the modern wrapper implementation.
